summary: The implementation successfully addresses all three requirements with comprehensive free transform functionality for icons and text labels, including selection, grouped movement, resize handles (corner and edge), and visual feedback via selection boxes and resize handles.

hallucinated_features.description: Image resize functionality with resize handles for uploaded images
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly states in non-goals: 'Transform tools for connections, drawings, or other diagram elements'. Images are diagram elements separate from icons, yet the diff shows resizing functionality for images (resizingImage state, onResizeImage handlers).

The BuildRequest non-goals exclude transform tools for diagram elements other than icons. Images are separate elements, yet the diff shows draggingImage state and onMoveImage functionality integrated with the transform system.
